title: T/CCI Manufacturing
description:
T/CCI is a world leader in compressor technology including reciprocating, swash plate, wobble p
late, variable compressor and air brake compressor designs. We are an Original Equipment Manufa
cturer for trucking, off-highway, agriculture/construction, specialty vehicle and transport ref
rigeration markets.

We will upload 35gb of corporate data soon. Employee personal docs (passports, DLs, SSNs, payme
nt details, credit cards and so on), contracts and agreements, client and partners information,
NDAs, financials, lots of confidential files, etc.
